name: Join The Eggman Empire! Looking For New Recruits!
description:
[Current Recruits 10/10:] 100%..!!!!!!!!

GOAL HAS BEEN REACHED!!!!!!!!!

Urgent Tranmission....

.........

Eggman: How long has it been? A few months? Sage, when was the last update?

Sage: November 29th, 2025 father

Eggman: GOD DAMN! What took so long? You all forget about your new boss or something? Now I have new plans...ugh this took awhile....

Metal: Hue Hue Hue

Infinite: Can we get back on track now or what?

Eggman: Yeah whatever jackal, Now then....

Sage: Father is it finally time to take over mobius?

Eggman: No...I have a feeling something bad is happening, may need that rodents help again....

Metal: Hue hue huh(I don't wanna work with that fake)

Infinite: Same

Sage: Yes father, I shall send a call to him and the rest of his friends

Sage goes and leaves the room, leaving the three as Eggman sighed.

Infinite: Rough day doctor?

Eggman: Yeah, for once...I have a...REALLY bad feeling...

Metal nodded his head as Eggman looked at the computer.

Need to get back on track.

Eggman: So congratulations to the following NEW members of my empire...

Aureos The Hedgehog

Caspian The Experimental Human

Kombi The "Unassuming" Rabbit

Cross The "Created" Cat

Hosea The "Last" Gunner

Henia the "Flying" Fox(Plus Hop)

Plague The Loyal Doctor

Hacker The
creator: Rainbow_Raman
